---
title: "Lecture 01: Introduction - A Roadmap to Autonomous Robotic Systems"
author: "Yonghyeon Lee"
date: today
---

## Learning goals

- Understand the scope of modern robotics.
- Connect modeling, actuation, perception, planning, and control.
- See how all course modules fit into one robotics pipeline.

## What is an autonomous robot?

A practical robot system includes:

- Mechanical body and actuation
- Sensing and state estimation
- Decision making (planning and control)
- Software/hardware integration in the loop

## Course roadmap

1. Modeling and simulation foundations
2. Actuation and low-level dynamics
3. Planning and control
4. Perception and learning-based methods

## Summary

- Robotics is a systems discipline.
- Each lecture builds one layer of a complete autonomy stack.
